user.title: Picnic Companion — Login
user.description: Enter your Picnic credentials. If your device is unknown, an SMS code will be sent at the next step. The session token is valid for 180 days (~6 months); you'll be warned 7 days before expiry.

two_factor.title: SMS verification code
two_factor.description: Picnic just sent a code via SMS to the phone number associated with {email}. Enter it below.

reauth_confirm.title: Picnic re-login required
reauth_confirm.description: The Picnic token for {email} has expired or is about to. Continue to re-enter your credentials.

error.sms_failed: Could not trigger the SMS. Try again in a few minutes.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach Picnic. Check your connection.

abort.already_configured: This Picnic account is already configured.

confirm.title: Renew Picnic token
confirm.description: The Picnic token expires in {days} day(s). Continue to re-authenticate (a new SMS code will be required).

confirm.title: Picnic re-authentication required
confirm.description: The Picnic token has expired. Continue to re-authenticate.
